---
title: "Build_panel"
author: "Marisa Carter"
date: "2026-04-22"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(fixest)
library(did)
library(bacondecomp)
library(haven)
library(dplyr)
library(janitor)
library(stringr)
library(tidyr)
library(readr)
library(pdftools)


district_data <- read_csv("/Users/marisalenaycarter/Desktop/CEP-Fiscal-Effects/data/raw/district_data.csv")
f33_data <- read_csv("/Users/marisalenaycarter/Desktop/CEP-Fiscal-Effects/data/raw/NCES_f33.csv")

colnames(f33_data)

# turn f33 into a long dataset
f33_data <- f33_data %>% clean_names()

f33_subset <- f33_data %>%
  select(
    agency_name,
    agency_id_nces_assigned_district_latest_available_year,
    starts_with("total_students_all_grades_excludes_ae_district_"),
    starts_with("total_revenue_totalrev_district_finance_"),
    starts_with("total_revenue_local_sources_tlocrev_district_finance_"),
    starts_with("total_revenue_state_sources_tstrev_district_finance_"),
    starts_with("total_revenue_federal_sources_tfedrev_district_finance_"),
    starts_with("total_revenue_totalrev_per_pupil"),
    starts_with("total_revenue_local_sources_tlocrev_per_pupil"),
    starts_with("total_revenue_state_sources_tstrev_per_pupil"),
    starts_with("total_revenue_federal_sources_tfedrev_per_pupil"),
    starts_with("total_students_all_grades_excludes_ae_district"),
    starts_with("total_current_expenditures_instruction_tcurinst_district_finance")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    across(
      -c(agency_name, agency_id_nces_assigned_district_latest_available_year),
      ~ readr::parse_number(as.character(.))
    )
  )

f33_long <- f33_subset %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(
      agency_name,
      agency_id_nces_assigned_district_latest_available_year
    ),
    names_to = "name",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    start_year = str_extract(name, "20\\d{2}(?=_\\d{2}$)"),
    end_suffix = str_extract(name, "(?<=20\\d{2}_)\\d{2}$"),
    variable = str_remove(name, "_20\\d{2}_\\d{2}$")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    start_year = as.numeric(start_year),
    end_year = as.numeric(paste0(substr(start_year, 1, 2), end_suffix)),
    school_year = paste0(start_year, "-", end_year),
    year = start_year
  ) %>%
  select(
    agency_name,
    agency_id_nces_assigned_district_latest_available_year,
    school_year,
    year,
    variable,
    value
  )

f33_panel <- f33_long %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = variable,
    values_from = value
  )

remove_agencies <- c(
  "CLACKAMAS ESD",
  "COLUMBIA GORGE ESD",
  "DOUGLAS ESD",
  "GRANT ESD",
  "HARNEY ESD REGION XVII",
  "HIGH DESERT ESD",
  "INTERMOUNTAIN ESD",
  "JEFFERSON ESD",
  "LAKE ESD",
  "LINN BENTON LINCOLN ESD",
  "OREGON DEPARTMENT OF EDUCATION",
  "LANE ESD",
  "MALHEUR ESD REGION 14",
  "NORTH CENTRAL ESD",
  "NORTHWEST REGIONAL ESD",
  "ODE HEAD START",
  "REGION 18 ESD",
  "SOUTH COAST ESD",
  "SOUTHERN OREGON ESD",
  "UNION-BAKER ESD",
  "WILLAMETTE ESD"
)

f33_panel <- f33_panel %>%
  filter(!agency_name %in% remove_agencies)

### clean up district data
district_panel <- district_data %>%
  mutate(
    school_year = paste0(year, "-", year + 1)
  )

district_CEP_panel <- f33_panel %>%
  left_join(
    district_panel %>%
      select(
        leaid,
        school_year,
        agency_type,
        urban_centric_locale,
        est_population_total,
        est_population_5_17,
        est_population_5_17_poverty
      ),
    by = c(
      "agency_id_nces_assigned_district_latest_available_year" = "leaid",
      "school_year" = "school_year"
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    share_child_poverty =
      est_population_5_17_poverty / est_population_5_17
  )

cep_panel <- read_csv(
 "/Users/marisalenaycarter/Desktop/CEP-Fiscal-Effects/data/raw/CEP_panel_combined.csv",
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

district_CEP_panel_merged <- district_CEP_panel %>%
  left_join(
    cep_panel %>%
      select(
        LEANAME,
        school_year,
        CEP_treat,
        All_Sites
      ),
    by = c(
      "agency_name" = "LEANAME",
      "school_year" = "school_year"
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    CEP_treat = replace_na(CEP_treat, 0),
    all_sites_year = if_else(
      str_detect(str_to_upper(str_trim(All_Sites)), "A"),
      1,
      0,
      missing = 0
    )
  ) %>%
  group_by(agency_name) %>%
  mutate(
    first_treat_year = min(if_else(CEP_treat == 1, year, NA_real_), na.rm = TRUE),
    first_treat_year = if_else(is.infinite(first_treat_year), NA_real_, first_treat_year),
    all_sites_first = any(
      year == first_treat_year & all_sites_year == 1,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    All_sites = if_else(
      !is.na(first_treat_year) & all_sites_first,
      1,
      0
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(
    -All_Sites,
    -all_sites_year,
    -all_sites_first
  )

write_csv(
  district_CEP_panel_merged,
  "/Users/marisalenaycarter/Desktop/CEP-Fiscal-Effects/data/processed/OR_CEP_clean.csv"
)

```
